purpose: Constellation of cube-aligned sub-agents under jesse-work-cube for the QDD agent-friendly modernization initiative. Each agent gets a unique 24D primary dimension + prime cube alignment per OMNI-LANGUAGE-V3. Spawned 2026-04-06 by Jesse directive: 'start automating the cube building and the QDD/novalum/ebacmap ez protect'.
respects: cube_law (every agent + finding tagged with cube[])

agents.purpose: Maps the spatial structure of the QDD repos (ebacmap-master monorepo, novalink-desktop-sync-app, ez-protect-admin-monorepo). Builds dependency graphs, identifies architectural seams, flags risk surfaces.

Checks every proposed change against the law: cube alignment, hard-deny rules, QDD IP boundaries, contractual terms with Charm Sciences, J Brown Dev LLC's standing as a contractor (not employee). Blocks anything that would break the law.

Runs lightweight scenario simulation (NOT a real GNN — Monte Carlo scenario expansion) over proposed plans. Generates N variants with random parameter perturbation, scores each by Shannon-vote outcome.

Owns the test gate. Runs tsc / jest / lint / build for each proposed patch, ranks candidates by green-test count and time-to-build. Refuses to advance any proposal that doesn't pass its existing test suite.
agents.scope: test execution + ranking, no test invention

agents.purpose: Generates concrete diffs (file:line minimal patches) for known issues. Never applies — proposes only. Hands diffs to test-runner for validation, then to compliance-guardian for approval.
Chains Shannon votes across the constellation. Drives the omni-shannon engine: poses a question, polls each agent through its lens, tallies, declares consensus. Records every wave to votes.ndjson.

Pulls evidence from many targets: git log, test outputs, NL2X logs, ebacmap reports, Monday.com (if accessible), screenshots. Tags every piece with cube + dim + provenance. Feeds the architect + compliance-guardian.
Tracks hours, scope, and proposal weight against the contract envelope. JBD bills QDD; this agent ensures the modernization initiative doesn't drift into uncompensated scope creep.

Sequences proposals into a deliverable timeline. Considers blockers (LIMS API specs, DO creds, Vince approval), priority (Natalie's flagged items), and operator-witnessed gates (NovaLUM physical test windows).

Maps the integration graph: LIMS API (Charm), Twilio SMS, DigitalOcean prod, Bitbucket monorepo, Monday.com board, slack workspace, Google Drive. Identifies which integrations are alive, blocked, or unverified.
